summary: Guarded m.CreatedAt[:10] slices in crm_gaps_ff.go, brief_ff.go, account_ff.go, and stale_ff.go against empty/short strings.
reason: Fathom meetings with missing created_at fields caused a runtime slice-bounds panic. search.go already had the len >= 10 guard; this propagates the same fix to the four remaining sites.
validated_outcome: go build ./... passes cleanly after the fix.
